name: agentic-qe
desc: Agentic QE Fleet is an open-source AI-powered QA/QE platform designed for use with Coding Agents (works best with Claude Code) featuring specialized agents and…
descFull: Agentic QE Fleet is an open-source AI-powered QA/QE platform designed for use with Coding Agents (works best with Claude Code) featuring specialized agents and skills to support testing activities for a product at any stage of the SDLC. Free to use, fork, build, and contribute. Based on the Agentic QE Framework created by Dragan Spiridonov.
